title: The Caribbean Mystery
writer: Jack Andrews, Leonard Praskins, Scott Darling
actors: James Dunn, Sheila Ryan, Edward Ryan
plot: Smith (James Dunn), a Brooklyn police detective, arrives on a Caribbean island chasing a murderer ... and wades his way through quicksand, swamps, alligators, corpses, clues, unusual suspects and a frisky femme fatale before nabbi...
